---
title: "IMP>ACT Survey Platform"
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    css: styles.css
    self-contained: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=DM+Serif+Display&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <script src="translations.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Header: altijd zichtbaar -->
  <header class="site-header">
    <div class="header-inner">
      <div class="logo-area">
        <span class="logo-dot"></span>
        <span class="logo-text" data-i18n="logoText">Survey Platform</span>
      </div>
      <nav class="lang-switcher" id="lang-switcher" aria-label="Language selector"></nav>
    </div>
    <p class="header-tagline" data-i18n="headerTagline">Share and use validated measurement instruments</p>
  </header>

  <!-- =============================================
       RESPONDENT-MODUS
       Wordt getoond als ?form=ID aanwezig is in de URL.
       De bevraging laadt automatisch, geen invoerveld zichtbaar.
       ============================================= -->
  <div id="respondent-mode" style="display:none;">
    <div class="respondent-wrapper">
      <div id="loading-indicator-resp" class="loading loading-full">
        <div class="loading-spinner"></div>
        <span data-i18n="loadingText">Loading survey...</span>
      </div>
      <iframe
        id="tally-frame-resp"
        src=""
        width="100%"
        height="100%"
        frameborder="0"
        marginheight="0"
        marginwidth="0"
        title="Survey"
        style="display:none; min-height:100vh;"
        onload="iframeLoadedResp()"
      ></iframe>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- =============================================
       BEHEER-MODUS
       Wordt getoond als er GEEN ?form=ID in de URL staat.
       Voor organisaties om hun link te testen.
       ============================================= -->
  <div id="admin-mode" style="display:none;">

    <!-- Intro sectie -->
    <section class="intro-section">
      <div class="intro-inner">
        <h1 class="main-title" data-i18n="mainTitle">Load your survey</h1>
        <p class="main-subtitle">
          <span data-i18n="mainSubtitle">Create a free account on Tally.so, import the template, and paste your personal link below.</span>
          <a href="https://tally.so" target="_blank" class="link">Tally.so</a>
        </p>

        <div class="steps-row">
          <div class="step">
            <span class="step-num">1</span>
            <span class="step-text" data-i18n="step1">Create a free account on Tally.so</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-arrow">→</div>
          <div class="step">
            <span class="step-num">2</span>
            <span class="step-text" data-i18n="step2">Import the survey template (.json)</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-arrow">→</div>
          <div class="step">
            <span class="step-num">3</span>
            <span class="step-text" data-i18n="step3">Copy your Tally link and paste it below</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="template-download">
          <span class="download-icon">⬇</span>
          <span data-i18n="downloadLabel">Download the survey template:</span>
          <a href="survey-template.json" download class="link bold">survey-template.json</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- URL invoer -->
    <section class="input-section">
      <div class="input-inner">

        <!-- Uitlegbox voor de organisatie -->
        <div class="admin-info-box">
          <strong data-i18n="adminInfoTitle">📋 For your organisation</strong>
          <p data-i18n="adminInfoText">After loading your survey below, copy the generated link and share it with your respondents. They will land directly on the survey — no extra steps needed.</p>
        </div>

        <label for="tally-url" class="input-label" data-i18n="inputLabel">Your Tally link</label>
        <div class="input-row">
          <input
            type="text"
            id="tally-url"
            placeholder="https://tally.so/r/yourcode"
            class="url-input"
            autocomplete="off"
            spellcheck="false"
          >
          <button onclick="loadSurveyAdmin()" class="load-btn" id="load-btn">
            <span class="btn-text" data-i18n="btnLoad">Load survey</span>
            <span class="btn-arrow">→</span>
          </button>
        </div>
        <p class="input-hint">
          <span data-i18n="inputHint">Both formats work:</span>
          <code>https://tally.so/r/abc123</code> or <code>https://tally.so/embed/abc123</code>
        </p>
        <div id="error-msg" class="error-msg" style="display:none;" data-i18n="errorMsg">
          ⚠ Invalid link. Use a Tally link in the format: tally.so/r/... or tally.so/embed/...
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Survey preview + deelbare link -->
    <section id="survey-section" class="survey-section" style="display:none;">
      <div class="survey-inner">
        <div class="survey-header">
          <span class="survey-badge" data-i18n="surveyBadge">Survey loaded</span>
          <button onclick="resetSurvey()" class="reset-btn" data-i18n="resetBtn">✕ Use a different link</button>
        </div>

        <!-- Deelbare link box — dit is het belangrijkste voor de organisatie -->
        <div class="share-box">
          <p class="share-box-title" data-i18n="shareTitle">🔗 Share this link with your respondents</p>
          <p class="share-box-subtitle" data-i18n="shareSubtitle">Respondents land directly on the survey, in full width, with consistent layout.</p>
          <div class="share-link-row">
            <input type="text" id="share-link-input" class="share-link-input" readonly>
            <button onclick="copyShareLink()" class="copy-btn" id="copy-btn">
              <span data-i18n="copyBtn">Copy link</span>
            </button>
          </div>
          <p id="copy-confirm" class="copy-confirm" style="display:none;" data-i18n="copyConfirm">✓ Link copied to clipboard!</p>
        </div>

        <!-- iframe preview -->
        <p class="preview-label" data-i18n="previewLabel">Preview (as respondents will see it):</p>
        <div class="iframe-wrapper" id="iframe-wrapper">
          <div id="loading-indicator-admin" class="loading">
            <div class="loading-spinner"></div>
            <span data-i18n="loadingText">Loading survey...</span>
          </div>
          <iframe
            id="tally-frame-admin"
            src=""
            width="100%"
            height="800"
            frameborder="0"
            marginheight="0"
            marginwidth="0"
            title="Survey preview"
            style="display:none;"
            onload="iframeLoadedAdmin()"
          ></iframe>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div><!-- /admin-mode -->

  <!-- Footer -->
  <footer class="site-footer">
    <p data-i18n="footer">Developed as an open measurement instrument · Free to use by all organisations</p>
  </footer>

</div>

<script src="https://tally.so/widgets/embed.js" async></script>

<script>
// ================================================
// TAALWISSELAAR
// ================================================

let currentLang = DEFAULT_LANG;

function detectBrowserLang() {
  const lang = (navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage || '').slice(0, 2).toLowerCase();
  return LANGUAGE_ORDER.includes(lang) ? lang : DEFAULT_LANG;
}

function buildLangSwitcher() {
  const container = document.getElementById('lang-switcher');
  container.innerHTML = '';
  LANGUAGE_ORDER.forEach(code => {
    const t = TRANSLATIONS[code];
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'lang-btn' + (code === currentLang ? ' active' : '');
    btn.setAttribute('title', t.langName);
    btn.setAttribute('aria-label', t.langName);
    btn.innerHTML = `<span class="lang-flag">${t.flag}</span><span class="lang-code">${code.toUpperCase()}</span>`;
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => switchLang(code));
    container.appendChild(btn);
  });
}

function applyTranslations(lang) {
  const t = TRANSLATIONS[lang];
  if (!t) return;
  document.documentElement.lang = t.htmlLang;
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
    const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
    if (t[key] !== undefined) el.textContent = t[key];
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n-html]').forEach(el => {
    const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n-html');
    if (t[key] !== undefined) el.innerHTML = t[key];
  });
  const input = document.getElementById('tally-url');
  if (input) input.placeholder = t.placeholder;
}

function switchLang(lang) {
  currentLang = lang;
  applyTranslations(lang);
  buildLangSwitcher();
  // Surveytaal volgt de UI-taal mee, tenzij de organisatie
  // al een expliciete keuze heeft gemaakt via de keuzeknoppen
  if (!surveyLangManuallySet) {
    selectedSurveyLang = lang;
    buildSurveyLangSelector();
  }
  try { sessionStorage.setItem('surveyLang', lang); } catch(e) {}
}

// ================================================
// URL PARAMETER DETECTIE
// ================================================

function getFormIdFromUrl() {
  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const formParam = params.get('form');
  if (formParam && /^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$/.test(formParam)) return formParam;
  return null;
}

function getLangFromUrl() {
  // Lees ?language= uit de Netlify-pagina URL
  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const lang = (params.get('language') || '').toLowerCase();
  return LANGUAGE_ORDER.includes(lang) ? lang : null;
}

// Geselecteerde taal van de survey (volgt UI-taal tenzij handmatig gekozen)
let selectedSurveyLang = DEFAULT_LANG;
let surveyLangManuallySet = false;

function buildSurveyLangSelector() {
  const container = document.getElementById('survey-lang-options');
  if (!container) return;
  container.innerHTML = '';
  LANGUAGE_ORDER.forEach(code => {
    const t = TRANSLATIONS[code];
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'survey-lang-btn' + (code === selectedSurveyLang ? ' active' : '');
    btn.setAttribute('type', 'button');
    btn.setAttribute('title', t.langName);
    btn.innerHTML = `<span class="lang-flag">${t.flag}</span> <span>${t.langName}</span>`;
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      selectedSurveyLang = code;
      surveyLangManuallySet = true;
      buildSurveyLangSelector();
      // Herbereken de share-link als die al zichtbaar is
      const shareInput = document.getElementById('share-link-input');
      if (shareInput && shareInput.value) {
        const currentForm = new URLSearchParams(shareInput.value.split('?')[1] || '').get('form');
        if (currentForm) shareInput.value = buildShareUrl(currentForm, selectedSurveyLang);
      }
    });
    container.appendChild(btn);
  });
}

function buildShareUrl(formId, lang) {
  // Voeg zowel ?form= als ?language= toe aan de respondenten-URL
  const base = window.location.origin + window.location.pathname;
  return `${base}?form=${formId}&language=${lang}`;
}

// ================================================
// RESPONDENT-MODUS
// Laadt automatisch als ?form=ID aanwezig is
// ================================================

function startRespondentMode(formId) {
  document.getElementById('respondent-mode').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('admin-mode').style.display = 'none';

  // Haal de taalwaarde op uit de URL (?language=nl)
  // en geef die mee aan de Tally embed-URL zodat het hidden field
  // 'language' in Tally de waarde automatisch ontvangt.
  const lang = getLangFromUrl() || currentLang;
  const embedUrl = `https://tally.so/embed/${formId}?alignLeft=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1&language=${lang}`;

  const iframe = document.getElementById('tally-frame-resp');
  iframe.src = embedUrl;

  if (typeof Tally !== 'undefined') Tally.loadEmbeds();
}

function iframeLoadedResp() {
  document.getElementById('loading-indicator-resp').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('tally-frame-resp').style.display = 'block';
}

// ================================================
// BEHEER-MODUS
// Voor organisaties om hun link in te geven en
// de deelbare respondenten-URL te genereren
// ================================================

function startAdminMode() {
  document.getElementById('respondent-mode').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('admin-mode').style.display = 'block';
}

function extractFormId(url) {
  url = (url || '').trim();
  const patterns = [
    /tally\.so\/r\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/,
    /tally\.so\/embed\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/,
    /^([a-zA-Z0-9]+)$/
  ];
  for (const pattern of patterns) {
    const match = url.match(pattern);
    if (match) return match[1];
  }
  return null;
}

function loadSurveyAdmin() {
  const t = TRANSLATIONS[currentLang];
  const input = document.getElementById('tally-url').value;
  const errorMsg = document.getElementById('error-msg');
  const btn = document.getElementById('load-btn');
  const btnText = btn.querySelector('.btn-text');

  errorMsg.style.display = 'none';

  const formId = extractFormId(input);
  if (!formId) {
    errorMsg.style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }

  // Bouw URLs op — geef de geselecteerde surveytaal mee
  // zodat het Tally hidden field 'language' correct wordt ingevuld
  const embedUrl = `https://tally.so/embed/${formId}?alignLeft=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1&language=${selectedSurveyLang}`;
  const shareUrl = buildShareUrl(formId, selectedSurveyLang);

  // Vul de deelbare link in
  document.getElementById('share-link-input').value = shareUrl;
  document.getElementById('copy-confirm').style.display = 'none';

  // Laad de iframe preview
  const iframe = document.getElementById('tally-frame-admin');
  iframe.src = embedUrl;
  iframe.style.display = 'none';

  document.getElementById('survey-section').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('loading-indicator-admin').style.display = 'flex';

  setTimeout(() => {
    document.getElementById('survey-section').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
  }, 100);

  if (typeof Tally !== 'undefined') Tally.loadEmbeds();

  btn.classList.add('loading');
  btnText.textContent = t.btnLoading;
  setTimeout(() => {
    btn.classList.remove('loading');
    btnText.textContent = t.btnLoad;
  }, 3000);
}

function iframeLoadedAdmin() {
  document.getElementById('loading-indicator-admin').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('tally-frame-admin').style.display = 'block';
}

function copyShareLink() {
  const t = TRANSLATIONS[currentLang];
  const input = document.getElementById('share-link-input');
  const confirm = document.getElementById('copy-confirm');
  const btn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');

  navigator.clipboard.writeText(input.value).then(() => {
    confirm.style.display = 'block';
    btn.classList.add('copied');
    setTimeout(() => {
      confirm.style.display = 'none';
      btn.classList.remove('copied');
    }, 3000);
  }).catch(() => {
    // Fallback voor browsers zonder clipboard API
    input.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    confirm.style.display = 'block';
    setTimeout(() => { confirm.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
  });
}

function resetSurvey() {
  document.getElementById('survey-section').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('tally-url').value = '';
  document.getElementById('tally-frame-admin').src = '';
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

// ================================================
// INITIALISATIE
// ================================================

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  // Bepaal taal
  let startLang = DEFAULT_LANG;
  try {
    const stored = sessionStorage.getItem('surveyLang');
    startLang = (stored && LANGUAGE_ORDER.includes(stored)) ? stored : detectBrowserLang();
  } catch(e) {
    startLang = detectBrowserLang();
  }
  currentLang = startLang;
  buildLangSwitcher();
  applyTranslations(currentLang);

  // Surveytaal start op dezelfde taal als de UI-taal
  selectedSurveyLang = startLang;
  surveyLangManuallySet = false;
  buildSurveyLangSelector();

  // Detecteer modus op basis van URL-parameter
  const formId = getFormIdFromUrl();
  if (formId) {
    // Respondent-modus: overschrijf UI-taal met ?language= als die aanwezig is
    const urlLang = getLangFromUrl();
    if (urlLang) {
      currentLang = urlLang;
      buildLangSwitcher();
      applyTranslations(currentLang);
    }
    startRespondentMode(formId);
  } else {
    startAdminMode();
  }

  // Enter-toets op invoerveld
  const urlInput = document.getElementById('tally-url');
  if (urlInput) {
    urlInput.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') loadSurveyAdmin();
    });
  }
});
</script>
```
